claim_boundary: analysis-only synthesis of the Issue #2307 instrumented topology rerun; not benchmark-strength mitigation evidence

rerun_decision.reason: Issue #2307 already reran the same topology diagnostic slice after Issue #2282 score instrumentation and promoted the exact requested field block.

decision_rationale.no_alternatives_generated: rejected: 98 scored alternative opportunities and 90 ok hypothesis frames were present
decision_rationale.alternatives_invalid: rejected: scored alternatives were evaluated and rejected by lower topology selection score, not by a validity failure
decision_rationale.primary_route_overselected: accepted: rejected scored alternatives consistently lost by lower_topology_selection_score and topology-command influence never switched away from primary_route
decision_rationale.topology_not_relevant_for_case: rejected: topology command influenced 33 steps, all inheriting primary_route
decision_rationale.revision_candidate_found: partial: Issue #2393 names topology_hypothesis_near_parity_diversity_gate_v0 as the next diagnostic-only revision candidate

notable_rows.finding: route selector chose masked_cell_87_79 on a numerical tie with primary_route, but local command source was dynamic_window and topology_command_influence stayed null
primary_route selected; masked_cell_71_87 rejected by lower_topology_selection_score

next_research_direction: Use the Issue #2393 near-parity diversity-gate preflight to revise upstream topology hypothesis scoring/selection before downstream planner-command tuning.
